title: allium globosum var. albidum
intro: Allium globosum var. albidum, also known as the white globe garlic or white ball garlic, is a type of bulbous perennial plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its sulfur compounds and flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. The herbal preparations of Allium globosum var. albidum include fresh or dried bulbs, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or added to food, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
